return(function(...)local s,W do local D,A,O,g,S=math.floor,string.char,string.byte,tonumber,string.sub local function E(s,W)local A=0 for O=0,7,1 do local g=s/2+W/2 if g~=D(g)then A=A+2^O end s=D(s/2)W=D(W/2)end return A end local k,I="iiihhhiiiiihssss","\225\003\244\217\225\028\v\194\166\156\195\224\179 \237\191\252\153\019\239\000\000\001\000\000\001\a\000\000\000__index\006\000\000\000__call\005\000\000\000__mod\005\000\000\000__mul"local B=65 local G=1188 local p=false local function z(s)local z={}for W=1,#s,2 do local D=S(s,W,W+1)z[#z+1]=g(D,16)end local H={}for s=0,3,1 do local W=z[s+1]local D=((W-G)+256)%256 local A=O(k,s%16+1)local g=O(I,s%B+1)H[s+1]=E(E(D,A),g)end local Z=((H[1]+H[2]*256)+H[3]*65536)+H[4]*16777216 local V={}for s=1,Z,1 do local W=z[s+4]if p and s%2==0 then W=(W%16)*16+D(W/16)end local g=((W-G)+256)%256 local S=(s-1)%16+1 local H=(s-1)%B+1 local Z=O(k,S)local F=O(I,H)V[s]=A(E(E(g,Z),F))end return table.concat(V)end local Z={}W=setmetatable({},{__index=function(s,W)return Z[W]end,__call=function(s,W)return Z[W]end,__mod=function(s,W)return Z[W]end,__mul=function(s,W)return Z[W]end,__metatable=false})function s(W)local D=Z if not D[W]then for s=1,#H,1 do local A=H[s]local O=type(A[1])=="number"and A[1]or A[2]if O==W then local s=type(A[1])=="string"and A[1]or A[2]D[W]=z(s)break end end end return W end end return(function(D,O,g,S,E,k,I,V,v,o,P,Y,z,J,A,H,c,n,B,Z,F,G,w,p)A,F,J,c,G,w,o,P,V,B,Y,n,v,p,z,H,Z=function(A,g,S,E)local JJ={}local t,y,PJ,H,FJ,BJ,U,HJ,Z,a,m,K,R,EJ,gJ,X,N,f,IJ,i,M,u,L,j,DJ,Q,ZJ,T,GJ,x,AJ,OJ,sJ,G,l,b,z,C,I,WJ,r,pJ,q,kJ,d,e,h,SJ,zJ,VJ while A do if A<8633112 then if A<4469668 then if A<2442435 then if A<1191253 then if A<513610 then if A<282725 then if A<115771 then if A<40416 then if A<32954 then A=B[S[1]]I=A()A=D[W[s(5553)]]I={}else A=JJ[10]A=8745984 JJ[7]=JJ[9]end else if A<97848 then G=W[s(1679)]A=D[G]z=B[S[7]]H=0 G=A(z,H)A=2342912 else A=B[S[1]]I=A()I={}A=D[W[s(5075)]]end end else if A<277907 then if A<166500 then I=W[s(9238)]z=true A=D[I]H=W[s(9239)]G=W[s(106)]I=W[s(6559)]I=A[I]I=I(A,G,z)G=I I=W[s(8232)]A=D[I]I=A(G)G=nil A=I()I=D[H]z=A H=W[s(3113)]z=nil A=I[H]H=A A=D[W[s(3114)]]H=nil I={}else A=JJ[2]A=11962368 VJ=JJ[1]end else z=H y=0 u=255 A=B[S[1]]j=A(y,u)A=16184320 G[z]=j z=nil end end else if A<432268 then if A<397764 then if A<288227 then A=4077056 GJ=nil else A=3026944 end else if A<408913 then zJ=nil A=2280448 else A=5985280 end end else if A<494219 then if A<475604 then FJ=W[s(3115)]HJ=D[FJ]A=6845952 FJ=HJ(kJ)ZJ=not FJ pJ=ZJ else Q=nil i=nil a=nil JJ[61]=W[s(3116)]m=nil h=nil gJ=nil zJ=nil m=W[s(1680)]f=nil R=nil SJ=nil BJ=V(BJ)L=nil h=W[s(5603)]C=nil zJ=W[s(4119)]sJ=nil y=nil JJ[18]=W[s(8233)]AJ=V(AJ)JJ[112]=W[s(1681)]Z=nil t=nil l=nil e=nil JJ[20]=W[s(5792)]X=nil u=V(u)JJ[81]=W[s(3352)]IJ=nil EJ=nil HJ=nil JJ[60]=W[s(1682)]WJ=V(WJ)K=nil OJ=nil b=nil JJ[34]=W[s(5554)]u=W[s(3353)]q=nil U=V(U)pJ=V(pJ)N=V(N)X=W[s(5793)]z=V(z)y=W[s(8760)]H=V(H)JJ[2]=W[s(5794)]l=W[s(1683)]Z=W[s(1829)]WJ=W[s(3354)]kJ=V(kJ)JJ[37]=W[s(5795)]d=nil e=W[s(1684)]JJ[90]=W[s(5555)]a=W[s(484)]H=W[s(9238)]JJ[6]=W[s(5796)]ZJ=nil i=W[s(2207)]FJ=nil j=V(j)C=W[s(673)]VJ=V(VJ)z=D[H]JJ[142]=W[s(8999)]H=W[s(6559)]JJ[38]=W[s(1680)]H=z[H]j=W[s(1685)]JJ[5]=W[s(4120)]H=H(z,Z)JJ[99]=W[s(5797)]JJ[128]=W[s(8234)]AJ=W[s(3117)]gJ=W[s(9766)]IJ=W[s(6560)]JJ[71]=W[s(3354)]SJ=W[s(6561)]d=W[s(5076)]JJ[4]=W[s(3355)]Z=W[s(8232)]z=D[Z]Z=z(H)z=Z()Z=p()B[Z]=z
